name: Nureum · 누름꽃
description:
Nureum (누름꽃, meaning “pressed flower”) is a quiet, offline-first iOS app that turns flowers found in everyday life into digital pressed-flower keepsakes.

Photograph a flower in the camera tab—or choose one from Photos—and Nureum gently separates it from its surroundings. You can refine the cutout, adjust its pressed texture, fading, warmth, grain, and edges, then preserve it in My Flower Collection with the date, location, notes, and tags attached to the moment.

The collection can be searched and revisited by flower, season, date, or place. A fully localized Guide introduces 355 flowers across eight languages, including their blooming seasons, habitats, characteristics, and traditional flower meanings.

In the decoration tab, saved flowers become creative materials. Arrange them over photographs, move, resize, and rotate them like stickers, then finish the composition with frames, handwriting, and other decorative elements before saving or sharing it.

Nureum also keeps its social layer intentionally small. Pair with one Flower Friend and send a single flower to their private flower inbox through CloudKit. A home-screen widget brings flowers from your collection back into view, while the share extension lets you preserve photographs directly from the Photos app.

There is no separate account to create, no advertising, and no subscription.

Nureum is built for iOS 17 and later with SwiftUI and SwiftData. Its core collection and image-editing experience works offline and processes photographs directly on the device. VNGenerateForegroundInstanceMaskRequest performs foreground segmentation, while Core Image renders the pressed-flower treatment. SwiftData manages structured metadata, and original photographs and derived assets are stored separately in a file-backed media store to preserve image quality and keep the database lightweight.

CloudKit powers the one-to-one Flower Friend connection and flower delivery. WidgetKit, App Groups, and the share extension allow saved flowers and incoming photographs to move naturally between the app, the home screen, and Photos.
features: Photograph a flower or import one directly from Photos
Create an on-device foreground cutout with Apple Vision
Fine-tune the cutout and pressed-flower treatment non-destructively
Preserve each flower with its date, location, notes, and tags
Search and revisit flowers by season, date, name, or place
Explore a fully localized Guide containing 355 flowers in eight languages
Arrange saved flowers into cards and photographs with frames and decorative elements
Pair with one Flower Friend and send a flower to their private inbox
Revisit flowers through a home-screen widget
Import photographs using the system share extension

name: PickCam
tagline: Auto-reframe any group video around one person
description:
Group dance videos, concerts, school recitals — the moment you actually want is one person, but the frame is everyone. PickCam turns any multi-person video into a fancam of whoever you pick: tap a person once and the app follows them to the end of the clip, reframing every frame around them for 9:16, 1:1, or 16:9.

Everything runs on-device. A Core ML detector (YOLOX-Tiny) works alongside Apple's Vision framework to detect, segment, and track people frame by frame, while a face-embedding model re-identifies the chosen subject after occlusions and re-entries — the hard part of this problem is not finding people, it's not losing the *right* one. A path optimizer then smooths the crop trajectory so the output reads like a camera operator followed the subject rather than a bounding box snapping around them. There is no server and no account; video never leaves the device.

The tracking is editable rather than take-it-or-leave-it: split the timeline into segments to switch subjects mid-video, or drop keyframes and drag/pinch the crop when a detection is missed. Export runs through AVFoundation with Metal-based upscaling for 4K output, and monetization is built in — StoreKit 2 subscriptions for Pro, with a rewarded-ad and daily-quota gate on the free tier.
features: Tap one person in a group video and get a fancam — AI follows them to the end
On-device person detection and face re-identification that survives occlusion and re-entry
Reframe to 9:16, 1:1, or 16:9 for Reels, Shorts, and TikTok
Switch the tracked subject per timeline segment, or correct framing with keyframes
Export up to 4K (HEVC/H.264) with Metal-based quality upscaling
